name: i9-clothes-system
description: I9 服装制造管理系统

scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter types build && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter portal build
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter api test:unit && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter portal test
scripts.test:all: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:api && pnpm test:e2e
